name: IDBI Bank Euphoria World Credit Card
tagline: Premium travel-focused card with high reward rates and insurance
description: The IDBI Bank Euphoria World Credit Card is a premium Visa World credit card designed for frequent travellers and high-spend users. With accelerated reward rates on travel (6 DP per Rs 100), hotel and IRCTC bookings (3 DP per Rs 100), comprehensive air travel insurance, and fuel surcharge waiver, this card delivers strong value for travel enthusiasts.

notes: Recommended annual income of Rs 6 Lakh+

charges.label: Annual Fee
charges.note: Plus applicable GST from second year

conditions: Complimentary domestic and international lounge access
Visa World cardholder benefits
Lounge visits subject to availability
Guest access available at additional charge

benefits.title: Welcome Benefit - Delight Points
benefits.description: Earn 4,000 Delight Points on first transaction of Rs 1,500 or more within 60 days of card issuance.
conditions: First transaction of Rs 1,500+ within 60 days
Points credited within 30 days of qualifying spend
No welcome benefit if threshold not met within 60 days

benefits.title: Accelerated Rewards on Travel
benefits.description: Earn 6 Delight Points for every Rs 100 spent on travel bookings including flights, hotels, and holiday packages.
conditions: Applicable on airline tickets, hotel bookings, holiday packages
MCC codes for travel merchants must be recognized
Points credited within 30 days of transaction

benefits.title: Reward Points on Hotel & IRCTC
benefits.description: Earn 3 Delight Points for every Rs 100 spent on hotel bookings, IRCTC train tickets, and bus bookings.
conditions: Applicable on hotel, IRCTC, and bus bookings
Points credited within 30 days of transaction

benefits.title: Reward Points on Other Spends
benefits.description: Earn 2 Delight Points for every Rs 150 spent on all other merchant categories.
conditions: Applicable on retail, dining, entertainment, and online spends
Fuel, wallet loads, and utility bills may be excluded

benefits.title: Fuel Surcharge Waiver
benefits.description: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 5,000 at all fuel stations across India. Maximum waiver of Rs 500 per statement cycle.
conditions: Applicable on fuel transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 5,000
Maximum waiver of Rs 500 per statement cycle
Available at all fuel stations in India

benefits.title: Air Travel Accident Insurance
benefits.description: Comprehensive air travel accident insurance cover of Rs 25 Lakh when flight tickets are booked using the IDBI Euphoria World Credit Card.
conditions: Applicable when air tickets are booked using the card
Coverage valid for the primary cardholder only
Claims must be filed within 30 days of incident

benefits.title: Interest-Free Credit Period
benefits.description: Enjoy up to 48 days of interest-free credit period on all retail transactions.
conditions: Applicable on retail purchases only
Cash advances attract interest from day one

benefits.title: Global Merchant Acceptance
benefits.description: Accepted at over 9 Lakh merchants across India and 29 million merchants worldwide through the Visa network.
conditions: Visa network acceptance worldwide
Subject to merchant terminal compatibility

rewardProgram.name: IDBI Delight Points
rewardProgram.earnRate: 6 DP per Rs 100 on travel, 3 DP per Rs 100 on hotel/IRCTC/bus

bonusCategories.description: 6 Delight Points per Rs 100 on travel bookings
3 Delight Points per Rs 100 on hotel bookings
3 Delight Points per Rs 100 on IRCTC bookings
3 Delight Points per Rs 100 on bus bookings
2 Delight Points per Rs 150 on all other spends

conditions: Points credited within 30 days of transaction posting
Points expire 2 years from accrual date
Minimum 500 points required for redemption
Bonus categories earn at specified rates

welcomeBonus.description: Earn 4,000 Delight Points on first transaction of Rs 1,500+ within 60 days of card issuance.
conditions: First transaction of Rs 1,500+ within 60 days
Points credited within 30 days of qualifying spend
No benefit if threshold not met within 60 days

milestoneBonuses.description: Earn 2,000 bonus Delight Points on annual spend of Rs 3 Lakh
Earn 5,000 bonus Delight Points on annual spend of Rs 5 Lakh

feeWaivers.description: Annual fee waived on annual spend of Rs 3 Lakh

features: Accelerated rewards on travel (6 DP per Rs 100)
3 DP per Rs 100 on hotel, IRCTC, bus bookings
Fuel surcharge waiver up to Rs 500/month
Air travel accident insurance of Rs 25 Lakh
Up to 48 days interest-free credit period
Global acceptance at 9 Lakh+ India, 29M+ worldwide merchants
Annual fee waiver on Rs 3 Lakh spend

reviews.summary: Excellent travel-focused card with high reward rates on travel spends, strong welcome bonus, and comprehensive insurance.
pros: High reward rate of 6 DP per Rs 100 on travel
cons: Fee waiver requires Rs 3 Lakh annual spend
